changes: feat(telegram): webhook URL change now hot-reloads live config on confirm — no restart needed
On confirm: writes .env, syncs os.environ, and calls reset_config_singleton() so get_config() returns the new URL immediately (single-worker deployments = fully applied)
Webhook screen mode line: 'Local (.env) — applies on save' (was 'restart to apply')
Success message: 'Live now — no restart needed' (was 'Restart the server to apply')
No restart button added (per design); apply is automatic on save
notes: Closes the pending-restart gap from 7.8.0/7.8.1: editing the webhook URL from Telegram now takes effect immediately. Multi-worker caveat: only the bot's worker hot-reloads, but .env holds the new value for any later full restart. The user runs single-worker (default), so changes are fully live on confirm.
